title: Kantandere
description: A mod that makes death a little more interesting with an entire new dimension.
body:
# Kantandere Mod
###  	Make dying more fun!
## The Kantandere
  •	A new dimension full of wonders
  
  •	7 New Biomes
  
  •	2 New Structures
  
  •	1 New Mob
  
  •	2 New Ores
  
  •	Accessible through death
# The Afterlife
  •	Upon death, be transported to the Kantandere
  
  •	Gravestones, much like other mods
  
  •	Several ways back to life
  
    o	Ruins of Resurrection, found in the Fields of Acceptance
    
    o	Tithed Beds, found at the same coordinates as the bed in the overworld, but requires a Memento Token to use
    
    o	/backtolife command (operator only)
# Memento Tokens
  •	Powerful magic items capable of returning you to life
  
  •	Can have additional effects, too!
  
    o	Stronger ones let you keep some or all of your inventory upon death
  
  •	Crafting through Necrosynthesis
  
    o	New crafting method done through death
    
    o	New items will appear in your inventory if you have certain items in your inventory on death
  •	Token of Value
  
    o	Crafted through Necrosynthesis with one Emerald and one Worry Wood Plank
    
    o	Single use
    
    o	Allows you to respawn at a bed
  
  •	Token of Understanding
  
    o	Crafted through Necrosynthesis with one Cobalt Ingot and one Worry Wood Plank
    
    o	64 Uses
    
    o	Allows respawning at a bed and brings your whole inventory into the Kantandere with you
# Still Under Development
  •	Stay tuned for new features and updates
  
  •	Please be patient
